name: minvest
description: Minvest - Russell 1000 NPORT backtest static report hosted on Cloudflare Workers. 'deploy' script is ONLY for Cloudflare Git CI builds (do not run locally).

scripts.deploy: node -e "if (!process.env.CI && !process.env.WORKERS_CI) { console.error('ERROR: Local deploy cancelled! ONLY git push is allowed for deployment (see README). All builds use the token from your local .env via Dashboard Build secrets.'); process.exit(1); }" && wrangler deploy
